Learn more

Designed with purpose, engineered to last

SKU: J.26.JKW.MTS.GY.1XS.1

View full details

Versatile warmth, every day comfort

Ideal for all-day adventures in any conditions

Redesigned for 2026, the MTN Surf Recycled Jacket is a super comfortable, do everything jacket that features a looser fit and a body mapped fabric layout with two 100% recycled 20K waterproof / 20K breathable 2L fabrics. The jacket is lightly insulated for those chilly mornings waiting for first chair.

Performance

Waterproof

9/10
20K
Waterproof rating: 9 out of 10

Breathability

9/10
20K
Breathability rating: 9 out of 10

Warmth

9/10
PrimaLoft® PURE
Warmth rating: 9 out of 10

Key benefits

Best for everyday resort shredding

Body mapped 20K/20K RECYCLED fabrics for durability and breathability

Longer length and lightly insulated for warmth and protection

Fit & sizing

Fit

Regular articulated fit for unrestricted movement while skinning or riding

Size chart

Size XS S M L XL
Arm length 76 - 77 cm 77 - 78 cm 78 - 79 cm 79 - 80 cm 80 - 81 cm
Chest 80 - 85 cm 85 - 90 cm 90 - 95 cm 95.5 - 101.5 cm 102 - 109 cm
Waist 67 - 72 cm 72.5 - 76.5 cm 77 - 82 cm 82.5 - 88.5 cm 89 - 96 cm
Hips/seat 87 - 92 cm 92.5 - 96.5 cm 97 - 102 cm 102.5 - 108.5 cm 109 - 116 cm
Inseam length 76 - 77 cm 77.5 - 78 cm 78.5 - 79.5 cm 80 - 81.5 cm 81.5 - 83 cm

Product features

Construction

Fabric is 100% recycled 20K waterproof 20K breathable four-way stretch two-layer laminate shell made without PFAS. Lined with 100% recycled polyester.

Pockets

  • Forearm pass pocket
  • One zipped external chest pocket
  • Two zipped hand pockets
  • Two internal mesh drop pockets

Features

  • Zipped arm pit vents
  • Minimalist powder skirt
  • Helmet compatible hood
  • Adjustable hood with cord locks
  • Adjustable waist with cord locks
  • Velcro adjustable cuffs
  • Recycled zip pull cords
  • YKK Aquaguard zippers
  • YKK Natulon recycled zippers
  • Five Red Flags print
  • Fully taped seams

Materials & supply chain

Details

100% recycled 75D polyester 4-way mechanical 2-layer stretch plain and ripstop face fabric combined. Fully laminated hydrophilic clear membrane with PFC-Free DWR. 100% Recycled Polyester Lining. Made with Bluesign certified fabrics.

Oeko-Tex and/or Bluesign® certified mills

All our fabrics come from Oeko-Tex® and/or Bluesign® certified mills. Oeko-Tex and Bluesign textiles and fabrics are certified to be free of harmful chemicals and safe for human use.

Supply chain map

We have nothing to hide about our production. We proudly share information about our factory partners and material suppliers so you can know exactly where and how the Jones products you buy are made.

Socially responsible factories

All our outerwear and apparel production facilities are Business Social Compliance Initiative (BSCI) or Worldwide Responsible Accredited Production (WRAP) certified. These certifications guarantee that the people who make our apparel receive fair salaries and work in safe and clean working environments.

Built with recycled materials

All of our outerwear and apparel is built using recycled fabrics. Most are 100% recycled. Using recycled materials helps keep waste out of the landfill and reduces the need for virgin materials.

See supply chain map



Laura C.

Verified



Anto

perfect! Love it

I love this jacket! It’s perfect whether I’m out splitboarding or spending a day at the ski resort. Warm and breathable — exactly what I need.

Fit

True to Size



Chelsey D.

Snowboard jacket

Great jacket, by far my favorite snowboard jacket I’ve had. Has some insulation which helps keep me warm! Love Jones products!



London C.

I love my outerwear that

I love my outerwear that I bought. The only recommendation I have is to make a long version of the jacket. Length of arms and length of body. I’m tall but I’m very slim so if I go up to a medium, I’m swimming in it, but the small just needs a few more inches on the arms and the body! I love it though!

More


Ted H.

favorite jacket!

this jacket is so warm and dry. i love how adjustable it is, especially on the hood. i couldn’t have asked for something better!



Alexandra M.

Very impressed- highly recommend!

I’ve been very impressed with my Jones gear. It’s warm on cold days, yet breathable when you need it to be. The waterproofing is extremely effective, and the sizing was spot on. I’ve had trouble finding gear that fits right. This jacket fits close enough to the body to be streamlined, and still has enough room
that movement is not restricted. On days colder than 20 degrees Fahrenheit, I use a thin puffy as a midlayer but even on its own I’ve been very comfortable on colder days. The size chart was very accurate for me. This has been the perfect gear for my riding style- great for the resort, and some side country. I have not tested it in backcountry so far, but I’d imagine it would perform exceptionally well based on my experience so far.

More


Sacha J.

Keeps on delivering.

Extremely comfortable and durable jacket. More insulated then expected yet lightweight. Perfect resort jacket that can also deliver on the skin track. Extremely water resistant and easy to move in. As a small rider I can't say it enough, Jones has got your covered. Tell all your short friends. An investment you won't regret.

More


Nelly S.

Love This Jacket

This was my go to jacket all season, it's incredibly comfortable, lightweight, and warm. On the coldest of days you can layer up with a puffy but it's pretty warm as is. On most days in Tahoe you can just toss it on and go rip. It really puts off that look good feel good energy on the slopes, plus it has all the right pockets in the right places. There's plenty of storage for all the needs of a resort pow day, pocket snacks, multitool, bonus goggle lens, and spare neckie for the possible tomahawk. It doubles as a great cold day backcountry jacket as well. The waterproofing held up pretty good, but on those extra wet days I recommend switching over to your goretex.

More


Holly H.

Love but have minor dislikes

Love the fit and function of the jacket. However, there is one feature that I am so bummed about. The jacket does not have wrist gators. I understand lots of people might not like them, but for an insulated jacket that is more geared for the resort, It would be nice to have gators as the sleeves ride up anytime I move my arms. Which then makes me have to fidget with all my Velcro while riding. Or if I put my arms down the in snow I just get it up my sleeve and I don't like or want wet wrists. Maybe I just have longer arms but ugh I am so sad I didn't realize this before buying the kit.

This is just picky me but If I had the option, it would also be nice if you could have the choice to remove the powder skirt. Because I wear the bibs I feel like the pow skit is just extra fabric I don't want.

The positives: pockets on the jacket are great, the jacket does not twist when you ride and is very comfy.

More

Women’s sizing details

Relaxed fit with articulated cut for dynamic movement at the resort or in the backcountry

Size XS S M L XL
Arm length 76 - 77 cm 77 - 78 cm 78 - 79 cm 79 - 80 cm 80 - 81 cm
Chest 80 - 85 cm 85 - 90 cm 90 - 95 cm 95.5 - 101.5 cm 102 - 109 cm
Waist 67 - 72 cm 72.5 - 76.5 cm 77 - 82 cm 82.5 - 88.5 cm 89 - 96 cm
Hips/seat 87 - 92 cm 92.5 - 96.5 cm 97 - 102 cm 102.5 - 108.5 cm 109 - 116 cm
Inseam length 76 - 77 cm 77.5 - 78 cm 78.5 - 79.5 cm 80 - 81.5 cm 81.5 - 83 cm

How to measure

1. Arm: with arm relaxed at your side and slightly bent, measure from center back neck, across shoulder to elbow and down to wrist.

2. Chest: with arms relaxed at your sides, measure under your arms, across the fullest part of your chest.

3. Waist: measure across waist at the smallest circumference.

4. Hip/seat: measure around the fullest part of the seat about 7’’ from waist line.

5. Inseam: measure while standing from the crotch seam down to the bottom of your ankle.

Women’s sizing details

Relaxed fit with articulated cut for dynamic movement at the resort or in the backcountry

Size XS S M L XL
Arm length 29.9 - 30.3 in 30.3 - 30.7 in 30.7 - 31.1 in 31.1 - 31.5 in 31.5 - 31.9 in
Chest 31.5 - 33.5 in 33.5 - 35.4 in 35.4 - 37.4 in 37.4 - 40.0 in 40.0 - 42.9 in
Waist 26.4 - 28.3 in 28.3 - 30.1 in 30.1 - 32.3 in 32.3 - 34.8 in 34.8 - 37.8 in
Hips/seat 34.3 - 36.2 in 36.2 - 38.0 in 38.0 - 40.2 in 40.2 - 42.7 in 42.7 - 45.7 in
Inseam length 29.9 - 30.3 in 30.3 - 30.7 in 30.7 - 31.3 in 31.3 - 32.1 in 32.1 - 32.7 in

How to measure

1. Arm: with arm relaxed at your side and slightly bent, measure from center back neck, across shoulder to elbow and down to wrist.

2. Chest: with arms relaxed at your sides, measure under your arms, across the fullest part of your chest.

3. Waist: measure across waist at the smallest circumference.

4. Hip/seat: measure around the fullest part of the seat about 7’’ from waist line.

5. Inseam: measure while standing from the crotch seam down to the bottom of your ankle.

Size Finder

Get the right board size for you

Not sure which size will suit you best? We can put you in the right ballpark if you give us your boot size and weight. If you’d really like to dial in your board choice, contact our Gear Gurus here.
